items.title: Ingredient Names
items.content: Shilajit (Asphaltum punjabianum) Resin, KSM-66® Ashwagandha (Withania somnifera) Extract, Ginger (Zingiber officinale) Extract, Black Musli (Curculigo orchioides) Extract, Gokshura (Tribulus Terrestris) Extract, Kaunch  Extract, Panax Ginseng Extract, Akarkara (Anacyclus pyrethrum) Extract, Excipients: Fructooligosaccharides, Pectin, Citric Acid, q.s. Contains Added Natural Flavour- Tamarind

items.title: For best results:
items.content: Eat 2 gummies daily after a heavy meal

cards.name: Shilajit
cards.description: Shilajit, containing fulvic acid, works by boosting cellular energy production and improving nutrient absorption.
cards.largeDescription: Shilajit, rich in fulvic acid and over 84 minerals, enhances mitochondrial function to boost cellular energy production. It improves nutrient absorption, supporting increased stamina, vitality, and overall well-being.

cards.name: KSM-66 Ashwagandha
cards.description: KSM-66 Ashwagandha reduces cortisol levels, thereby managing stress and enhancing overall well-being.
cards.largeDescription: KSM-66 Ashwagandha is a highly concentrated extract that reduces cortisol levels, helping to manage stress. Clinical studies show it improves mental clarity, enhances physical performance, and supports overall well-being by modulating stress responses.

weGotAnswers.heading: Got Questions ?
weGotAnswers.subHeading: Its normal to be curious, we will answer your doubts comprehensively here, for everything else we are just a Whatsapp message away.

answers.title: What is Shilajit and how can I use it for energy?
contents: Shilajit is a natural mineral-rich resin from the Himalayas, packed with fulvic acid and 80+ trace minerals. It supports energy. Traditionally taken in resin form, today it’s available as capsules or gummies. For convenience, Man Matters Shilajit Gummies are a safe, tasty, vegan, sugar-free way to consume purified Himalayan Shilajit daily, also lab-tested for purity and quality.

answers.title: Where is Shilajit sourced from?
contents: We source Shilajit from trusted vendors who get it from Himalayas and offer you the best results.

answers.title: Are these Gummies vegetarian?
contents: Yes, Man Matters Shilajit Concentrate is 100% Vegan and Sugar-Free.

answers.title: Can I take it as a pre-workout?
contents: This Shilajit Gummies can be taken pre- or post-workout to boost energy levels.

answers.title: How do we know you make this from the best Shilajit available?
contents: Our shilajit resin is ethically sourced from the Himalayan mountains. This makes it 100% pure and natural. We have also gotten an Australian Made Safe certificate on this.

answers.title: Is it a sugar-coated gummy?
contents: Man Matters Shilajit Gummies do not contain added sugar or sugar coating. It is not a sugar candy but a nutritionally packed gummy.

answers.title: What benefits can I expect from Man Matters Shilajit Gummies if I take them daily?
contents: With consistent use, these gummies help boost energy, strength, and stress resilience. Thanks to Shilajit’s fulvic acid and Ashwagandha, they also aid stress management, and workout recovery. Compared to plain supplements, Man Matters Shilajit Gummies supports it as a complete men’s health solution.

answers.title: What are Man Matters Shilajit Gummies and why are they different than resin or capsules?
contents: Man Matters Shilajit Gummies are tamarind-flavoured, sugar-free, vegan gummies that make consuming Himalayan Shilajit very simple, convenient and tasty. Unlike sticky resin or hard-to-swallow capsules, these gummies deliver >65% fulvic acid, 80+ trace minerals, and Ayurvedic herbs like Ashwagandha and Gokshura in an easy chewable form. They are lab-tested, FSSAI-approved, and designed for men who want energy support without the hassle of raw Shilajit.

answers.title: What is the correct dosage of Man Matters Shilajit Gummies?
contents: The recommended dosage is 2 gummies daily after meals. Each gummy contains 150 mg purified Shilajit, giving you 300 mg daily. Taken consistently, this dosage supports energy. Because the gummies are pre-measured, you avoid risks of overdosing  a problem common with raw resin.

answers.title: Can Shilajit help boost energy and manage stress?
contents: Yes. Shilajit contains fulvic acid and minerals that helps in strengthening the immune system, while Man Matters Shilajit Gummies is combined with Ayurvedic herbs like Ashwagandha to reduce stress. Together, they improve resilience, recovery, and overall health. These ingredients have been traditionally used in Ayurveda, and our gummies make it simple to consume them in a safe, lab-tested form.

answers.title: Are Man Matters Shilajit Gummies safe to consume every day?
contents: Yes. These gummies are designed for daily use, purified through a 7-step filtration, and tested for heavy metals, aflatoxins, and contaminants. They are also sugar-free, vegan, and preservative-free. Most users can take them safely every day, but if you have heart conditions, kidney issues, or are on medication, consult your doctor before starting.

answers.title: Are Man Matters Shilajit Gummies good for gym-goers and athletes?
contents: Absolutely. Shilajit boosts mitochondrial energy, while herbs like Gokshura and Ginseng support muscle endurance and recovery. Many athletes use Shilajit for better performance, reduced fatigue, and improved strength. If you’re into workouts, Man Matters Shilajit Gummies supports it as a natural pre-workout and recovery aid without stimulants or synthetic boosters.

answers.title: Why choose Man Matters Shilajit Gummies over other Shilajit brands?
contents: Man Matters ensures lab-tested purity, FSSAI approval, and doctor-backed formulations. Their gummies include not just Shilajit but a powerful blend of Ayurvedic herbs that gives value results. Many brands sell raw, unpurified resin that may contain heavy metals. Man Matters Shilajit Gummies combine safety, convenience, and effectiveness in one tasty format.

steps.description: Ensures a highly purified, potent Shilajit extract for maximum effectiveness.
Engineered for superior absorption, delivering faster and more noticeable benefits compared to regular Shilajit.
No artificial colours or preservatives. Just clean, high quality Shilajit in a delicious gummy.
Each and Every Batch that you receive is 3rd Party Tested – Certified for Purity, Safety, and Quality by NABL Accredited Labs.
Eat 2 gummies daily after a heavy meal
